title: Exploration MC
description: A mod that enhances the exploration aspect of Minecraft with new block breaking mechanics
body:
# ExplorationMC

ExplorationMC is a Minecraft mod that transforms the early game experience, making survival more challenging and exploration more rewarding. This mod is designed for players seeking a fresh, more difficult start to their Minecraft journey, emphasizing strategic resource gathering and careful progression.

## Key Features

### 1. Overhauled Block Breaking Mechanics
- Stone-type blocks (including ores) require pickaxes
- Wood and plant-based blocks require axes
- Dirt and sand-like blocks require shovels
- Most blocks are unbreakable by hand, forcing tool crafting
- Specific blocks (e.g., leaves, cobwebs) require shears

### 2. Enhanced Mob Difficulty
- Zombies and Skeletons spawn with better equipment (up to 35% chance in hard mode)
- Increased probability of iron armor (30% of armored mobs)
- Higher chance of enchanted weapons (up to 60% in hard mode)

### 3. Extensive New Advancement System
- "Getting Wood" is now a challenge advancement
- Multiple advancement lines guide players through various aspects of gameplay:
  - Redstone Technology: From basic circuits to advanced automation
  - Combat: Progressing through different weapon tiers and combat techniques
  - Nomadic: Encouraging exploration and survival skills
  - Village Interaction: Trading, protection, and villager-related tasks
  - Resource Gathering: Tiered goals for obtaining and processing resources
  - And many more!

### 4. Crafting Level Requirements
- Stone items require player level 10
- Iron items require player level 20
- Diamond items require player level 30
- Netherite items require player level 45
- Levels are only required for first time crafting an item

## Compatibility
- Minecraft 1.20.1, Fabric Loader 0.14.21 or above
- Compatible with Minecraft Comes Alive: Reborn

## Tips for Surviving ExplorationMC
1. Trade with villagers to obtain essential tools early on
2. Fight mobs at night to gain XP and level up for crafting
3. Prioritize finding a village for shelter and resources
4. Focus on mining coal and iron as soon as you craft a stone pickaxe
5. Be cautious of stronger mobs - retreat if necessary
6. Utilize the environment for protection (e.g., dig shelter, use high ground)
7. Craft a shield as soon as possible for better defense
8. If you are struggling, select "bonus chest" when creating the world

ExplorationMC recreates the challenge of your first Minecraft experience, making every decision crucial and every resource valuable. Whether you're a veteran seeking a fresh challenge or a newcomer desiring an intense survival experience, ExplorationMC offers a unique and engaging way to play Minecraft. Prepare to rediscover the thrill of early game survival and embark on a more rewarding journey of exploration and discovery!
